name: messages_list
description: Retrieve message history for a channel. Returns messages in reverse chronological order with pagination support.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: The channel name to retrieve history for.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start of time range (millisecond epoch or ISO 8601).

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End of time range (millisecond epoch or ISO 8601).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 100, max 1000).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Order of results: forwards or backwards (default).
